
### why can't we\ldots  {.smaller}



::: {.r-stack}
![](/pipeline/texfig/loadUseNoForward.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/loadUseNoForward.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}


:::
 ![](/pipeline/texfig/loadUseNoForward_2.figure.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center }
